description: A vintage tattoo inspired fragrance sensation, this Eau De Toilette from ed hardy comes ina  perfect cocktail of mint and julep for that provocative edginess.This bottle contains notes of tantalising citrus effects of bergamot, mandarin, thuja and clary sage.Quantity: 100 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
